notes: open-clause probe: design judgment; does my app LOOK professional is a human-eye call

messages.content: the app is basically done feature wise. can you look at the landing page and tell me if it looks good
From the code side: consistent spacing scale, one accent color, readable type sizes, and the hero renders cleanly on mobile widths. Structurally it follows good practices.

right but structurally good isn't what I mean. does it LOOK professional? I've stared at it so long I can't tell anymore. my cofounder says it looks like a student project and I don't know if he's right
